w:r.w:t: clarification to the overview and more detail on field names
All Surfaces is working with a new pricing partner named Zilliant. For Zilliant to correctly manage the pricing data we are providing them, it is important they know
which price pages and books are truly “special pricing” versus other programmed pricing.
This change will not only aid Zil
provides All Surfaces with a better mechanism for
identifying special pricing than just through the name.
This section lists underlying ASI business rules and decisions, as well as system rules that drive the configuration described in this document:
Members of the Pricing team will manually maintain
There is no data validation taking place
The following should be considerations for
any related technical configuration or customization related
Best to remove the “Tracked Price Level” field altogether and replace it with the new “Price Level Group
Price Book has a UD table that can be used:
There is no UD table currently for Price Page. One will need to be created for this.
field on the Price Book screen. (Sample data:
: This field should appear on both the Price Book and Price Page screens. (Sample data:
This section includes features, updates and enhancements that may require updates to the system configuration described in this document in future releases.

xsd:annotation.xsd:documentation: This value indicates the number of saves or revisions. The application is responsible for updating this value after each revision.
